data.title: Looking At Datadog's Recent Unusual Options Activity
EVgo Surges With $1 Billion Boost As ChargePoint Stumbles In Tough Market
data.description: EV charging stocks down 21% in Nov, but EVgo shines w/ consistent growth and expanding customer base. Tesla dominates, but EVgo's playbook for success positions it well for the future.

data.title: Sony 'Worried' When Xbox Arrived, But GTA Gave PlayStation An Edge
data.description: Sony inked an exclusivity deal that paid off; With Grand Theft Auto 3, PlayStation cement its console dominance.

data.title: Energy Drink Firm Celsius Set to Energize Market Growth, Analyst Sees Significant Upside
data.description: Analyst rates CELH as Buy with $38 price target, expects revenue growth from rebounding market and zero-sugar demand, and improved inventory.

data.title: Dollar General 'Back-To-Basics' Strategy Earns Analyst Upgrade Following Mixed Earnings
data.description: Dollar General's Q3 results show mixed analyst views, with a "Back-to-Basics" strategy facing competitive pressures despite some positive signs.
